GenAiFunction.description: Updates an opportunity field (Stage, Close Date, or Amount) by opportunity name or ID.
GenAiFunction.capability: Use this action when the user wants to change or update an opportunity. Supported updates: stage (e.g., "move Deal X to Proposal"), close date (e.g., "push the close date to April 30"), and amount (e.g., "update the amount on Deal X to $2.5M"). Always confirm the specific change with the user before executing. Do not use for lookups, summaries, or revenue forecasting.

genAiFunctionInputs.description: Salesforce ID of the opportunity to update. Use this when the ID is known for accuracy.
Name or partial name of the opportunity to find. Used when ID is not available. The action will search and may return multiple matches for clarification.
Which field to update. Must be exactly one of: STAGE, CLOSEDATE, AMOUNT
The new value. For STAGE: exact stage name. For CLOSEDATE: YYYY-MM-DD format. For AMOUNT: number like 2500000.

genAiFunctionOutputs.description: True if the opportunity was updated successfully.
Human-readable confirmation of what was updated, ready to deliver to the user.
The name of the opportunity that was updated.
True if the name search returned multiple opportunities requiring clarification.
JSON array of matching opportunities when multiple matches are found.
Error description if success is false.
